---
name: Ingest CLI
description: CLI frontend for manual doc ingest during dev. Wraps REST API. v0.4.2.
type: project
---

Typer CLI for manually queuing documents during development and debugging. Wraps the ingest REST API with a human-friendly interface.

**Status:** v0.4.2. Stable for dev use. Not intended for production automation (use Batch Scheduler instead).

**Commands:** ingest, status, cancel, list, tail-log.
